overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk along the Del Perro Pier at sunset. The player moves from the pier entrance past food vendors toward the amusement park, then turns to walk beneath the roller coaster as the sky displays vibrant orange and pink hues.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the entrance of a wooden pier during a vibrant sunset. The camera walks forward along wet planks that reflect the pink sky, passing a jogger in red shorts on the left. A large blue building with outdoor seating is passed on the left side as the camera moves toward the open water and distant mountains.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the pier as food stalls and a large Ferris wheel come into view on the right. The wooden deck remains wet with puddles reflecting the intensifying sunset colors of orange and purple. The city skyline is visible in the distance beyond the amusement park structures.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and walks along the ocean side of the pier, passing beneath the roller coaster track with its green neon lights. The Ferris wheel is now on the left, and the wooden planks continue along the water's edge. Vending machines appear against the blue warehouse building as the camera moves deeper under the amusement park structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a wooden pier that transitions from an open entrance into the neon-lit heart of an amusement park under a vibrant sunset. It begins by moving forward across wet planks reflecting a pink sky, passing a jogger and a blue building with outdoor seating as distant mountains frame the horizon. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal food stalls and a towering Ferris wheel on the right, with the lighting shifting toward intensifying shades of orange and purple. The scene then turns right toward the ocean's edge, gliding beneath the green neon lights of a roller coaster track while the Ferris wheel shifts to the left. Finally, the camera moves deeper under the amusement park structures, passing vending machines against a blue warehouse building as the city skyline lingers in the distance.
